statistics.name: assists
statistics.description: The number of times a player who passes the ball to a teammate in a way that leads to a score by field goal, meaning that he or she was "assisting" in the basket. There is some judgment involved in deciding whether a passer should be credited with an assist.

statistics.name: turnovers
statistics.description: The number of times a player loses possession to the other team.

statistics.name: minutes
statistics.description: The total number of minutes played.

statistics.name: assistTurnoverRatio
statistics.description: The average number of assists a player or team records per turnover

statistics.name: rebounds
statistics.description: The total number of rebounds (offensive and defensive).

statistics.name: defensiveRebounds
statistics.description: The number of times when the defense obtains the possession of the ball after a missed shot by the offense.

statistics.description: The number of times when the offense obtains the possession of the ball after a missed shot.

articles.headline: Shams: Wemby cleared for G5 with no further discipline
articles.description: Shams Charania reports on Victor Wembanyama being cleared for Game 5, and Kendrick Perkins reacts to the news.

images.name: Shams: Wemby cleared for G5 with no further discipline
images.caption: Shams Charania reports on Victor Wembanyama being cleared for Game 5, and Kendrick Perkins reacts to the news.

articles.headline: Pacers GM: We believed Ivica Zubac was the right risk
articles.description: Pacers GM Kevin Pritchard joins "The Pat McAfee Show" to discuss the reasoning behind the trade for Ivica Zubac that saw them lose their pick in the 2026 NBA draft.

images.name: Pacers GM: We believed Ivica Zubac was the right risk
images.caption: Pacers GM Kevin Pritchard joins "The Pat McAfee Show" to discuss the reasoning behind the trade for Ivica Zubac that saw them lose their pick in the 2026 NBA draft.

articles.headline: NBA betting tips, DFS picks for Monday: Why to count on Donovan Mitchell in Game 4
articles.description: André Snellings breaks down Monday's playoff games and offers his favorite bets and DFS plays.

images.name: Donovan Mitchell [1296x729]
images.caption: The Cavs need another big game from Donovan Mitchell, who scored 35 points in their Game 3 win.
images.alt: Donovan Mitchell #45 of the Cleveland Cavaliers dribbles the ball during the game against the Detroit Pistons on May 9, 2026 at Rocket Arena in Cleveland, Ohio.
images.credit: David L. Nemec/NBAE via Getty Images

articles.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest news, injuries, league intel, updates
articles.description: Here's the latest news and reactions from our NBA insiders, including the latest on Kevin Durant's lingering ankle injury.

images.name: Evan Cohen's 2 intriguing names for the Magic's next head coach
images.caption: Evan Cohen reacts to news of the Magic dismissing head coach Jamahl Mosley and speculates as to who could replace him in Orlando.

articles.headline: Shams: Bucks 'fully open for business' on trade offers for Giannis
articles.description: Shams Charania reports that the Bucks are ready to field trade offers for Giannis Antetokounmpo.

images.name: Shams: Bucks 'fully open for business' on trade offers for Giannis
images.caption: Shams Charania reports that the Bucks are ready to field trade offers for Giannis Antetokounmpo.

articles.headline: Victor Wembanyama avoids suspension for Naz Reid elbow, will play Game 5
articles.description: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama will not face any further discipline for elbowing Minnesota's Naz Reid and will play in Game 5 against the Timberwolves in San Antonio, sources told ESPN.

images.name: Victor Wembanyama [600x400]
images.caption: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama was ejected after committing a flagrant foul 2 against Timberwolves forward Naz Reid in the second quarter of Sunday's Game 4 in Minneapolis, but will not face any discipline.

images.name: Shams: Wemby cleared for G5 with no further discipline
images.caption: Shams Charania reports on Victor Wembanyama being cleared for Game 5, and Kendrick Perkins reacts to the news.
